constraint: complete QWeight bundle <= 3.5 physical bits per original parameter
metric: mean per-conversation max(compressed assistant-token NLL - BF16 assistant-token NLL, 0)

HQQ W3 g128 axis 1 + RTN W3 g128 tail
AQLM 3x8 g8 calibrated + RTN W3 g128 tail
results.settings: 3 additive 8-bit codebooks over 8-weight vectors; 10 residual-kmeans iterations with 32 points per centroid; 2 Hessian/codebook optimization epochs of 5 steps
